description: A vulnerability classified as problematic was found in Legrand SMS PowerView 1.x. This vulnerability affects unknown code. The manipulation of the argument redirect leads to open redirect. The attack can be initiated remotely. The exploit has been disclosed to the public and may be used. The vendor was contacted early about this disclosure but did not respond in any way.
Claude Reasoning: Legrand SMS PowerView is a commercial power monitoring/management system (SMS = Supervisory Management System in the Legrand product line), not motorized window coverings; no CPE available to confirm
